mapper.delete: delete from dwd_order_item where dt = date(#{dt})
mapper.insert: insert into dwd_order_item( order_id, shop_id, shop_name, product_id, product_name, sku_id, sku_name, quantity, pay_amount, product_cost, platform_fee, ad_cost, freight_fee, refund_cost, profit_amount, order_status, pay_time, dt ) select o.order_id, o.shop_id, o.shop_name, jt.product_id, jt.product_name, jt.sku_id, jt.sku_name, jt.quantity, jt.pay_amount, coalesce(jt.product_cost, 0), coalesce(o.platform_fee, 0), coalesce(o.ad_cost, 0), coalesce(o.freight_fee, 0), coalesce(o.refund_cost, 0), jt.pay_amount - coalesce(jt.product_cost, 0) - coalesce(o.platform_fee, 0) - coalesce(o.ad_cost, 0) - coalesce(o.freight_fee, 0) - coalesce(o.refund_cost, 0), o.order_status, o.pay_time, date(o.pay_time) from ods_order_raw o join json_table(o.sku_order_list, '$[*]' columns ( product_id bigint path '$.productId', product_name varchar(128) path '$.productName', sku_id bigint path '$.skuId', sku_name varchar(128) path '$.skuName', quantity int path '$.quantity', pay_amount decimal(12,2) path '$.payAmount', product_cost decimal(12,2) path '$.productCost' )) jt where date(o.pay_time) = date(#{dt})

replace into dws_finance_day_profit( dt, shop_id, shop_name, gmv, net_amount, product_cost, platform_fee, ad_cost, freight_fee, after_sale_cost, profit_amount, order_count ) select dt, shop_id, max(shop_name), sum(pay_amount), sum(pay_amount - coalesce(refund_cost, 0)), sum(product_cost), sum(platform_fee), sum(ad_cost), sum(freight_fee), sum(refund_cost), sum(profit_amount), count(distinct order_id) from dwd_order_item where dt = date(#{dt}) group by dt, shop_id
